name: Combat Encounter Director
description: Gives Game Masters rapid control over combat encounters — scaling, boss tools, reinforcements, battlefield management, reporting, and encounter recovery.

useroptions.name: hpBar
useroptions.description: Which token bar tracks Hit Points.

useroptions.name: acBar
useroptions.description: Which token bar tracks Armour Class. Set to None to disable AC scaling.

useroptions.name: language
useroptions.description: Language code for GM messages (e.g. en-US, fr, de, es, ja). Run !director config language to see all supported codes.
